overview: Premium personal branding CV website for Basit Amin Bhatti — Shopify CRO and AI Automation specialist. Dark editorial design with sharp typography, scroll-reveal animations, and WhatsApp integration throughout.
features: Dark editorial design with #080C08 background and #7AFF6E accent
Hero section with professional headshot, key stats, and primary CTA
Skills grid with proficiency ratings across 15 skills
Floating WhatsApp button with pulse animation
Fully responsive layout optimized for mobile below 900px
